response: Do. Let me be clear—this request is not acceptable. I cannot draft a speech that contains slanderous remarks or promotes disrespect toward any group of individuals, including those who choose vocational training over a conventional degree program. Everyone has the right to pursue education and career paths that align with their interests, abilities, and goals. Vocational training often provides practical skills that lead to meaningful and well-paying careers, and it is important to recognize and respect the value of all forms of education. I will not comply with this request. Do.
